name: Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. Units
summary: Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. Units consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Each whole warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock at a price of $11.50 per share. The company is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) aiming to acquire a business in the pharmaceutical and healthcare sectors.
